title: ‘Hate has no place in US’: Indian-American Congressman condemns racist chants in Texas
summary_full: Congressman Raja Krishnamoorthi took a firm stance against the disturbing rise of hate with his condemnation of the 'Go back to India' slogan chanted during a demonstration outside a Texas city hall. He declared that such divisive sentiments are unacceptable in the United States.
